issue_summary: Use ThreadLocalRandom instead of Random and pull out its instantiation from the loop. Preallocate StringBuilder as well.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Generates a string of random chars from the B64T set.
     *
     * @param num
     *            Number of chars to generate.
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Generates a string of random chars from the B64T set. *

* The salt is generated with {@link ThreadLocalRandom}. *

* * @param num * Number of chars to generate. */
